3a:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"Before we continue, we need to add one more rewrite rule so that our client-side requests to the Auth0 API do not get rewritten. We need to do this because Auth0 requires us to use Next.js's API Router when implementing frontend auth inside of a Next.js application."}]
3b:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"The new rewrite simply catches requests to the Auth0 API before they are rewritten to our server API and instead sends them to the requested source path unchanged."}]

3f:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Rather than requiring authentication in each of our private pages or components, we will implement our auth with ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/routing/middleware","className":"font-light text-neutral-900 underline transition-all hover:text-[#008000]","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","children":"Next.js Middleware"}],", which will allow us to specify which routes we want to make private."]}]
40:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["There are several benefits to this approach. The primary benefit is that it enables client-side handling of authentication and authorization in our ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"Next.js"}]," application, as opposed to server-side handling in our ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"Express.js"}]," server."]}]
41:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"If we were to handle authentication on the server, we would need to send a request each time a user navigated to a new page. Consequently, our client-side application would also need to wait for our server to responds to each of those requests before allowing a user to actually view any content. You can imagine how this might become an unesary drag on performance."}]
42:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Furthermore, the use of middleware allows us to keep our auth logic separate from our other ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"application"}]," logic. This separation of concerns is a good design choice as the ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"modularity"}]," reduces cognitive load, and if, later, we decide to change auth managers, we only have to update one file as opposed to having to update every private page/component in our application."]}]

51:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["However, there is still a massive security flaw in our design. If you navigate to ",["$","a",null,{"href":"http://localhost:5000/api","className":"font-light text-neutral-900 underline transition-all hover:text-[#008000]","target":"_blank","rel":"nofollow","children":"http://localhost:5000/api"}],", you will see our ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"Server Running..."}]," message, which means that our route isn't actually protected."]}]
52:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"This is because nothing is preventing unauthorized users from bypassing our security simply by hitting our backend API routes instead of our frontend UI."}]

5f:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center expressjwt as jwt } from 'express-jwt';\nimport jwksRsa from 'jwks-rsa';\nconst issuerBaseUrl = process.env.AUTH0_ISSUER_BASE_URL;\nconst audience = process.env.AUTH0_AUDIENCE || 'http://localhost:5000/';\n\nexport const checkJwt = jwt({\n  secret: jwksRsa.expressJwtSecret({\n    cache: true,\n    rateLimit: true,\n    jwksRequestsPerMinute: 5,\n    jwksUri: 62:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"server/src/app.ts"}],["$","$L93",null,{"text":"import cookieParser from 'cookie-parser';\nimport express from 'express';\nimport flash from 'express-flash';\nimport morgan from 'morgan';\nimport {\n  generalErrorHandler,\n  notFoundHandler,\n} from './middleware/errorMiddleware';\nimport routes from './routes/index';\nimport { checkJwt } from './middleware/authMiddleware';\n\nconst app = express();\n\napp.use(morgan('dev'));\napp.use(express.json());\napp.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: false }));\napp.use(cookieParser());\napp.use(flash());\n\napp.use('/api', checkJwt, routes);\n\napp.use(notFoundHandler);\napp.use(generalErrorHandler);\n\nexport default app;\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 overflow-x-auto rounded-md "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#E1F3E7"},"children":"cookieParser"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"from"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" './middleware/errorMiddleware';\nimport routes from './routes/index';\nimport { checkJwt } from './middleware/authMiddleware';\n\nconst app = express();\nconst baseUrl = process.env.AUTH0_BASE_URL;\n\napp.use(morgan('dev'));\napp.use(cors({ origin: baseUrl }));\napp.use(express.json());\napp.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: false 7f:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Your fully updated ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"Private"}]," page should look like this:"]}]
12c:T508,'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';

export default function PrivatePage() {
  const [state, setState] = useState({
    isLoading: false,
    response: undefined,
    error: undefined,
  });

  const callApi = async () => {
    setState((previous) => ({ ...previous, isLoading: true }));

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/private-route');
      const data = await response.json();

      setState((previous) => ({
        ...previous,
        response: data,
        error: undefined,
      }));
    } catch (error) {
      setState((previous) => ({
        ...previous,
        response: undefined,
        error,
      }));
    } finally {
      setState((previous) => ({ ...previous, isLoading: false }));
    }
  };

  const { isLoading, response, error } = state;

  if (!isLoading) {
    return (
      <>
        <h1 className="mt-10 text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-6xl">
          Private Page
        </h1>

        <button
          onClick={callApi}
          className="mt-10 block rounded bg-pink-800/50 px-2 py-1 text-white hover:opacity-70"
        >
          Call API
        </button>

        <div className="mt-20">
          {response && <div>{JSON.stringify(response)}</div>}
        </div>
      </>
    );
  }
}

","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"client/src/app/private/page.tsx"}],["$","$L93",null,{"text":"$12c","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 py-4","data-language":"tsx","data-theme":"default","__withmeta__":"false","children":[["$","$L93",null,{"text":"$undefined"}],["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","data-line-numbers":"","data-language":"tsx","data-theme":"default","data-line-numbers-max-digits":"2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"'"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#AFCAAF"},"children":"use client"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"'"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":";"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":" "}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"import"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"{"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" 8b:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"The fully updated middleware will look like this:"}]
8c:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center  justify-between rounded-t-md border-b !border-b-gray-700 bg-[#121212] px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm font-medium text-neutral-200 ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"client/src/middleware.ts"}],["$","$L93",null,{"text":"import {\n  getSession,\n  withMiddlewareAuthRequired,\n} from '@auth0/nextjs-auth0/edge';\nimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';\n\nexport default withMiddlewareAuthRequired(async function middleware(\n  req: NextRequest,\n) {\n  if (req.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith('/api/auth')) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const requestHeaders = new Headers(req.headers);\n  const user = await getSession(\n    req,\n    NextResponse.next({\n      request: {\n        headers: requestHeaders,\n      },\n    }),\n  );\n  requestHeaders.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${user?.idToken}`);\n\n  const response = NextResponse.next({\n    request: {\n      headers: requestHeaders,\n    },\n  });\n  return response;\n});\n\nexport const config = {\n  matcher: ['/private/:path*', '/api/:path*'],\n};\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 overflow-x-auto rounded-md
